title: athyrium umbrosum var. tenerum
intro: Athyrium umbrosum var. tenerum, also known as the Himalayan lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant is used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Athyrium umbrosum var. tenerum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. Athyrium umbrosum var. tenerum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
